creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rakuco
Date: Sun Mar 13 13:40:39 UTC 2016
New revision: 410968
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/410968

Log:
  New port: devel/gitlab-shell.

  GitLab Shell handles git commands for GitLab and modifies the list of
  authorized keys.

  WWW: https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-shell

  PR:		207791
  Submitted by:	Torsten Z?hlsdorff <ports@toco-domains.de>

Changes:
  head/devel/Makefile
  head/devel/gitlab-shell/
  head/devel/gitlab-shell/Makefile
  head/devel/gitlab-shell/distinfo
  head/devel/gitlab-shell/files/
  head/devel/gitlab-shell/files/patch-config.yml.example
  head/devel/gitlab-shell/pkg-descr
  head/devel/gitlab-shell/pkg-plist
